requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EAC / GOST IEC 62368-1 for 220 V / 50 Hz European-Plug Grid (Type C/F) — Armenia
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——针对220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网的EAC / GOST IEC 62368-1（亚美尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——針對220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網的EAC / GOST IEC 62368-1（亞美尼亞）

summary.en: Armenia operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical grid — a legacy of Soviet-era infrastructure — and uses Type C (Europlug, CEE 7/16) and Type F (Schuko-compatible, CEE 7/4) plugs. Electrical safety for electronic and electrical equipment placed on the EAEU market, including Armenia, is governed by TR EAEU 004/2011 'On the safety of low-voltage equipment'. Wireless and IoT consumer devices with mains-connected power supplies are within scope. The applicable safety standard under TR EAEU 004/2011 for audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment is GOST IEC 62368-1 (the EAEU adoption of IEC 62368-1), which has superseded GOST IEC 60950-1. Conformity assessment requires testing by an EAEU-accredited safety laboratory and certification by an accredited EAEU conformity assessment body. The resulting EAC Certificate or DoC under TR EAEU 004/2011, obtained in any EAEU member state, is fully valid in Armenia. SARM (Armenian Standards Institute) is the national standards body administering GOST IEC 62368-1 and related electrical safety standards in Armenia. Chinese products designed for 220 V have a voltage-compatibility advantage over products designed for 110/120 V markets, but the plug type (Type A/I in China versus Type C/F in Armenia) and the certification framework differ and require separate EAEU assessment.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚使用220V/50Hz电网（苏联时期基础设施遗产），采用C型（欧式插头，CEE 7/16）和F型（Schuko兼容，CEE 7/4）插头。投放EAEU市场（含亚美尼亚）的电气和电子设备电气安全受TR EAEU 004/2011《低压设备安全》约束。带有市电连接电源的无线及消费类物联网设备在适用范围内。TR EAEU 004/2011下适用于音视频、IT及通信技术设备的安全标准为GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU版本），已取代GOST IEC 60950-1。合格评定须由EAEU认可的安全实验室进行测试，并由经认可的EAEU合格评定机构颁发证书。在任何EAEU成员国取得的TR EAEU 004/2011下的EAC证书或合格声明在亚美尼亚完全有效。SARM（亚美尼亚标准化研究院）是负责管理GOST IEC 62368-1及相关电气安全标准的国家标准机构。为220V设计的中国产品相较于110/120V市场产品具有电压兼容优势，但插头类型（中国为A/I型，亚美尼亚为C/F型）和认证框架不同，须进行独立的EAEU评定。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞使用220V/50Hz電網（蘇聯時期基礎設施遺產），採用C型（歐式插頭，CEE 7/16）和F型（Schuko相容，CEE 7/4）插頭。投放EAEU市場（含亞美尼亞）的電氣和電子設備電氣安全受TR EAEU 004/2011《低壓設備安全》約束。帶有市電連接電源的無線及消費類物聯網設備在適用範圍內。TR EAEU 004/2011下適用於音視頻、IT及通信技術設備的安全標準為GOST IEC 62368-1（IEC 62368-1的EAEU版本），已取代GOST IEC 60950-1。合格評定須由EAEU認可的安全實驗室進行測試，並由經認可的EAEU合格評定機構頒發證書。在任何EAEU成員國取得的TR EAEU 004/2011下的EAC證書或合格聲明在亞美尼亞完全有效。SARM（亞美尼亞標準化研究院）是負責管理GOST IEC 62368-1及相關電氣安全標準的國家標準機構。為220V設計的中國產品相較於110/120V市場產品具有電壓相容優勢，但插頭類型（中國為A/I型，亞美尼亞為C/F型）和認證框架不同，須進行獨立的EAEU評定。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 004/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union 'On the safety of low-voltage equipment' (Decision of the CU Commission No. 798, 16 August 2011)
GOST IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (EAEU adoption of IEC 62368-1)
Armenia grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type C (Europlug, CEE 7/16) and F (Schuko, CEE 7/4)
SARM (Armenian Standards Institute) — national body administering GOST IEC 62368-1 and electrical safety standards in Armenia

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for information technology equipment is GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1), enforced through CCC certification. A newer standard GB/T 42315 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published with a transitional timeline to be verified with CNCA. China uses a 220 V / 50 Hz grid (voltage-compatible with Armenia) but uses Type A (flat two-pin, NEMA 1-15) and Type I (oblique flat three-pin, AS/NZS 3112) plugs — distinct from Armenia's Type C/F. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 does not substitute for EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011 conformity under GOST IEC 62368-1. Products may require plug adaptation or redesign for the Armenian Type C/F market.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术设备的强制性电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1接轨），通过CCC认证执行。更新版标准GB/T 42315（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已发布，过渡时间表须向CNCA确认。中国使用220V/50Hz电网（与亚美尼亚电压兼容），但使用A型（平两脚，NEMA 1-15）和I型（斜扁三脚，AS/NZS 3112）插头——与亚美尼亚的C/F型不同。基于GB 4943.1的CCC电气安全认证不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格评定。产品可能需要针对亚美尼亚C/F型市场进行插头适配或重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國信息技術設備的強制性電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1接軌），通過CCC認證執行。更新版標準GB/T 42315（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已發布，過渡時間表須向CNCA確認。中國使用220V/50Hz電網（與亞美尼亞電壓相容），但使用A型（平兩腳，NEMA 1-15）和I型（斜扁三腳，AS/NZS 3112）插頭——與亞美尼亞的C/F型不同。基於GB 4943.1的CCC電氣安全認證不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格評定。產品可能需要針對亞美尼亞C/F型市場進行插頭適配或重新設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42315 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1; adoption timeline to be verified with CNCA)
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type A (flat two-pin) and I (oblique flat three-pin)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) does not substitute for EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011 conformity under GOST IEC 62368-1. Both China and Armenia use 220 V / 50 Hz (no voltage adaptation needed), but plug standards differ — Type A/I in China versus Type C/F in Armenia — requiring product adaptation. Conformity assessment must be conducted under the EAEU framework by an EAEU-accredited safety laboratory; an EAC Certificate or DoC covering TR EAEU 004/2011 must be obtained and registered. Products must display a combined EAC mark covering all applicable EAEU technical regulations (TR EAEU 004/2011 safety, TR EAEU 037/2016 radio, TR CU 020/2011 EMC). EAC electrical safety documents obtained in any EAEU member state are fully valid in Armenia — no Armenia-specific re-test is required within the EAEU framework. Note: post-2022 tech company relocation to Yerevan has increased Armenian demand for consumer electronics; supply chain routing via Armenia-Iran corridor or Georgia-Armenia transit should be assessed for current conditions.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格评定。中国和亚美尼亚均使用220V/50Hz（无需电压适配），但插头标准不同——中国为A/I型，亚美尼亚为C/F型——须对产品进行适配。合格评定须在EAEU框架内由EAEU认可的安全实验室开展；须取得并登记涵盖TR EAEU 004/2011的EAC证书或合格声明。产品须贴附覆盖所有适用EAEU技术法规（TR EAEU 004/2011安全、TR EAEU 037/2016无线电、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容）的组合EAC标志。在任何EAEU成员国取得的EAC电气安全文件在亚美尼亚完全有效——EAEU框架内无需针对亚美尼亚的重新测试。注意：2022年后大量科技公司迁至埃里温，增加了对消费类电子产品的需求；经亚美尼亚-伊朗走廊或格鲁吉亚-亚美尼亚过境的供应链路线应核实当前状况。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）不可替代GOST IEC 62368-1下的EAEU TR EAEU 004/2011合格評定。中國和亞美尼亞均使用220V/50Hz（無需電壓適配），但插頭標準不同——中國為A/I型，亞美尼亞為C/F型——須對產品進行適配。合格評定須在EAEU框架內由EAEU認可的安全實驗室開展；須取得並登記涵蓋TR EAEU 004/2011的EAC證書或合格聲明。產品須貼附覆蓋所有適用EAEU技術法規（TR EAEU 004/2011安全、TR EAEU 037/2016無線電、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容）的組合EAC標誌。在任何EAEU成員國取得的EAC電氣安全文件在亞美尼亞完全有效——EAEU框架內無需針對亞美尼亞的重新測試。注意：2022年後大量科技公司遷至葉里溫，增加了對消費類電子產品的需求；經亞美尼亞-伊朗走廊或格魯吉亞-亞美尼亞過境的供應鏈路線應核實當前狀況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity under TR EAEU 004/2011 (GOST IEC 62368-1) required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Armenia and the EAEU; plug adaptation from Type A/I to Type C/F required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the CU Commission No. 798

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAC conformity under TR EAEU 004/2011 (electrical safety, GOST IEC 62368-1) is mandatory for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Armenia. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not substitute. Products must adapt plug configuration from Chinese Type A/I to Armenian Type C/F. Combined EAC marking covering safety, radio, and EMC technical regulations is required. EAC documents issued in any EAEU member state are valid in Armenia without re-certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR EAEU 004/2011（电气安全，GOST IEC 62368-1）下的EAC合格标志对所有在亚美尼亚销售的市电供电无线及物联网设备为强制要求。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不可替代。产品须将插头配置从中国A/I型适配为亚美尼亚C/F型。须取得涵盖安全、无线电及电磁兼容技术法规的组合EAC标志。在任何EAEU成员国签发的EAC文件在亚美尼亚无需重新认证即有效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR EAEU 004/2011（電氣安全，GOST IEC 62368-1）下的EAC合格標誌對所有在亞美尼亞銷售的市電供電無線及物聯網設備為強制要求。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不可替代。產品須將插頭配置從中國A/I型適配為亞美尼亞C/F型。須取得涵蓋安全、無線電及電磁相容技術法規的組合EAC標誌。在任何EAEU成員國簽發的EAC文件在亞美尼亞無需重新認證即有效。
